author: sproul
content:
<@654267572107083777> Does Nimbus currently have a database schema that is viable for a blob archive node? We've discovered that LH's current schema is not able to support multi-terabyte blob archive DBs, and we are going back to the drawing board to fix it (see: https://github.com/sigp/lighthouse/issues/9214, https://github.com/sigp/lighthouse/issues/8928). It would be awesome if we could get the network's blob archivers onto Nimbus, to give us some time to fix LH, and to ensure that no blobs go missing as a result of LH being completely unusable.

(also if any other CL has a working blob archive node, let me know)
